_readme: Mimora dark color scheme. Selected via 'color_theme': 'dark' in settings.json; restart to apply. Keys starting with '_' are ignored. A missing key falls back to the built-in dark palette in config.py.
_surfaces: Backgrounds and borders. bg_main = window, bg_panel = panels/inputs/status bar, bg_accent = accent-tinted controls (buttons, combobox).
_text: text = body, text_emph = emphasized feedback, text_bright = selection fg / text cursor, text_dim = secondary labels, text_muted = tertiary/system, text_accent = text on accent-tinted controls, phrase = hero practice phrase (matched to the cyan 'you' prosody curve).
_face: Articulation face beside the prosody charts: white disc, dark-blue eyes, red-brown mouth. Kept identical to the light theme on purpose.
_status: Status and feedback colors. 'reference' marks everything related to the reference audio (status texts, prosody curve).
_mic: Mic button per-state inner fill; outlines reuse accent/bad/warn/good.
